emergency_definition: Client: Data center clients call at all hours if cooling fails. That's a true emergency. Regular HVAC issues can wait.
Client: Cooling failure in a data center, complete HVAC system down in a hospital or medical facility, refrigerant leak. Those are emergencies.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_message: Someone will call you back within 15 minutes.

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Collect name, number, and description. Confirm next-business-day followup.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: Apologize and promise callback within 15 minutes

integration_constraints: Client: We use ServiceTitan. No restrictions.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet after-hours. Ask purpose. Confirm emergency. Emergency: collect name/number/address → transfer to 602-555-0404. Fail: promise callback within 15 minutes. Non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day followup.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Collect name and number. Route emergency to 602-555-0404, non-emergency to scheduling.
questions_or_unknowns: Office address not found in transcript — needs confirmation
notes: Auto-extracted from transcript. Review emergency_definition for completeness.
